cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out who ends up with which book. So, there are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book. Let me list out their initial books first. Alice starts with Moby Dick. Bob starts with Ulysses. Claire has The Fellowship of the Ring. Dave has Lolita. Eve has Catch-22. Now, there are several swaps mentioned. Let me go through each one step by step. Maybe I should track each person's book after each swap. First swap: Claire and Bob swap books. So Claire gives her book to Bob, and Bob gives his to Claire. Let me note that down. After first swap (Claire & Bob): Claire now has Ulysses (Bob's original book). Bob now
